case_title: MITZI ULLOA VS. RONNIE DEWAYNE DAVIDSON et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2008 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON, RONNIE DEWAYNE FCC EQUIP FINANCING
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ULLOA, MITZI AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON, RONNIE DEWAYNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ULLOA, MITZI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIDSON, RONNIE DEWAYNE FCC EQUIP FINANCING $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00, DEFENDANTS RONNIE DEWAYNE DAVIDSON AND FCC EQUIPMENT FINANCING ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT TO BE $2500.00 AND DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF WAS NOT AT FAULT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ULLOA, MITZI AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON, RONNIE DEWAYNE FCC EQUIP FINANCING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-28-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON, RONNIE DEWAYNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-01-2010
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ULLOA, MITZI AS TO DEFENDANT FCC EQUIP FINANCING
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ULLOA, MITZI AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON, RONNIE DEWAYNE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-27-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FCC EQUIP FINANCING
CERTIFIED MAIL SENT TO OFFICE OF THE DIRECTOR DEPT OF MOTOR VEHICLES, GREEN CARD RECEIVED.
